root_cause: find_victim deterministic tie-breaker on all-MAX_ETR initial state collapses to a single way; tracker only ever installs at that way, so Mockingjay effectively occupies fewer ways than LRU until the STT warms. The 2000-op stream is too short to warm the STT/RTP enough to overcome that bias.
next_unblock_steps: Lengthen NUM_OPS to >=50_000 to allow STT/RTP warmup
Replace find_victim deterministic tie-breaker with random-among-ties when m == MAX_ETR (no learned signal yet)
Re-run harness; expected to flip to mockingjay_hit_rate > lru_hit_rate after warmup
phone_class_claim_blocked_reason: cocotb synthetic stream is not phone-class; remains blocked until full-system-simulator or silicon evidence.
